# EU AI Evidence Builder

> Self-hosted reviewer-ready EU AI Act evidence built from verified runtime data for tool-using AI agents.

## Start here
- [English homepage](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/)
- [Technical Overview](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/technology/)
- [How it works](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/how-it-works/)
- [Builder](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/builder/)
- [Documentation templates](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/templates/)

## Live proof
- [EU reviewer dossier HTML](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/demo/eu-ai-act/compliance/eu-ai-act-reviewer.html)
- [EU reviewer dossier PDF](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/demo/eu-ai-act/compliance/eu-ai-act-reviewer.pdf)
- [EU proof hub](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/demo/)
- [Machine-readable proof index](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/demo/product-surfaces.json)

## Product boundary
- Core evidence engine for tool-using AI agents
- EU AI Act vertical with reviewer dossier plus expanded technical pack
- Article 12-style record-keeping is necessary but not sufficient for high-risk review on its own
- Not legal advice, legal classification, or final sign-off automation

## Languages
- [English](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/)
- [Deutsch](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/de/)
- [Français](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/fr/)
